response.justification: The role demands 8 years of C++ as a hard minimum, plus production cloud compute platform and infrastructure leadership. This candidate's C++ exposure is limited to roughly six months at National Instruments (2014-2015) and a university thesis, far short of the requirement. Their depth is in TypeScript/Node.js and DLang web/backend work, with no internal cloud compute platform or formal technical-leadership experience. Distributed-systems exposure at Sociomantic is relevant but not enough to offset the core qualification gaps.
strengths: Real distributed/low-latency systems work (millions of HTTP requests/sec at Sociomantic)
Strong engineering-craft culture: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based, runs dojos/workshops
Broad polyglot range across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded
concerns: C++ experience is ~6 months, not the required 8 years
No cloud compute platform or production cloud architecture experience
